title: SensorReport
description:
The main sensor report output following sensor.report.v1 schema.

This format is compatible with the Cockpit CI governance ecosystem.
It extends the builddiag report format with:
- Structured verdict with counts and reasons
- Capabilities for "No Green By Omission"
- Fingerprinted findings for deduplication
- Artifact references

# Schema Version

This report follows the `sensor.report.v1` schema.

data.description: Optional arbitrary report-level metadata for downstream tooling.

findings.description: All findings with fingerprints for deduplication.

run.description: Information about this execution run, including capabilities.

schema.description:
Schema identifier for this report format.
Always "sensor.report.v1" for this version.

tool.description: Information about the tool that generated this report.

verdict.description: Structured verdict with status, counts, and reasons.

Artifact.description:
Artifact reference for sensor reports.

References additional output files produced by the sensor.

path.description: Path to the artifact file (relative to report).

Capability.description:
A capability status with optional reason for non-availability.

Used to track "No Green By Omission" - ensuring the report explicitly
states what features were or weren't available during the run.

reason.description: Reason for unavailability or skip, if applicable.

CapabilityStatus.description:
Status of a capability for "No Green By Omission" tracking.

Capabilities track whether features like git integration, config loading,
or toolchain detection were available during the run.

oneOf.description: Capability was not available (e.g., git not found).
Capability was available but skipped (e.g., by config).

GitInfo.description: Git repository information at the time of the run.

branch.description: Current branch name, if on a branch.

dirty.description: Whether the working directory has uncommitted changes.

HostInfo.description: Information about the host machine where builddiag was executed.

Location.description:
File location information for a finding.

Paths are repo-relative and use forward slashes on all platforms.

col.description: Column number in the file (1-indexed), if applicable.

line.description: Line number in the file (1-indexed), if applicable.

path.description: Repository-relative file path (always uses forward slashes).

SensorFinding.description:
Extended finding with fingerprint for deduplication.

Extends the base Finding with:
- `fingerprint`: Stable hash for deduplication across runs
- `help`: Optional help text from check documentation
- `url`: Optional URL to detailed documentation

check_id.description: Identifier of the check that produced this finding.

code.description: Machine-readable code identifying the type of finding.

data.description: Optional structured data for this finding.

fingerprint.description: Stable fingerprint for deduplication (sha256 of check_id+code+path+line).

help.description: Help text explaining how to fix the issue.

location.description: File location where the finding was detected, if applicable.

url.description: URL to detailed documentation for this finding type.

SensorRunInfo.description:
Run information for sensor reports with capabilities.

Extends RunInfo with a capabilities map for "No Green By Omission" tracking.

capabilities.description:
Capabilities map tracking feature availability.
Keys: git, config, toolchain, checksums, diff_aware

duration_ms.description: Duration of the run in milliseconds.

ended_at.description: Timestamp when the run completed, if finished (ISO 8601 format).

started_at.description: Timestamp when the run started (ISO 8601 format).

SensorVerdict.description:
Structured verdict for sensor reports.

Provides more detail than a simple status enum:
- `status`: The overall verdict (Pass/Warn/Fail/Skip)
- `counts`: Breakdown of findings by severity
- `reasons`: Human-readable reasons for non-pass verdicts

reasons.description: Reasons explaining the verdict (for non-pass statuses).

Severity.description:
Severity level of a finding.

Severity determines how a finding affects the overall verdict:
- `Info` - Informational, does not affect verdict
- `Warn` - Warning, may affect verdict depending on `fail_on` setting
- `Error` - Error, causes failure unless `fail_on` is set to `Never`

oneOf.description: Informational finding that does not indicate a problem.
Warning that may indicate a potential issue.
Error that indicates a definite problem.

ToolInfo.description: Information about the builddiag tool that generated the report.

VerdictCounts.description:
Counts of findings by severity for the sensor verdict.

Includes suppressed count for findings that were filtered out
by configuration or baseline.

suppressed.description: Number of suppressed findings (filtered by config/baseline).

VerdictStatus.description:
Verdict status for sensor reports (4 values).

Maps the 5-value Verdict to 4 values by collapsing Error into Fail.

oneOf.description: All checks passed with no findings affecting the verdict.
One or more checks failed (includes internal errors).
All checks were skipped (no meaningful result).
